data.name: FirmwareModeSpeedDetail
data.value: Affects stock text and animation modes

data.name: ForegroundNoReplay
data.value: Foreground only; never replays an action

data.name: ReduceMotionDetail
data.value: Stops automatic preview playback; explicit Play remains available.

data.name: BluetoothPickerDetail
data.value: Bluetooth is used only to find and control a nearby Shining Mask. Your content stays on this device.

data.name: DiagnosticsPrivacyDetail
data.value: Observed facts only. Reports redact device identifiers and do not include Library content.

data.name: LibrarySubtitle
data.value: Create, inspect and organize local content

data.name: ContentInheritsAppearance
data.value: Items keep their label, icon and color.

data.name: NoDeckActions
data.value: No actions yet. Add reusable content from the Library.

data.name: LiveHoldStageUnchanged
data.value: Live only. Stage hold/release behavior is unchanged.

data.name: WelcomeDetail
data.value: Create text, faces, animations and Shows. MaskApp works offline and keeps your content on this device.

data.name: BluetoothLocalDetail
data.value: Bluetooth lets MaskApp find and control a nearby Shining Mask. Your content and device history stay local.

data.name: AndroidLocationRationale
data.value: On Android 11 and older, the OS also requires Location permission for Bluetooth scanning. MaskApp does not use your location.

data.name: ChooseMaskDetail
data.value: Recognized masks are listed by name and signal. Device identifiers stay hidden.

data.name: OfflineNoAccount
data.value: No account, cloud sync, or internet connection is required.

data.name: BrokenReferencesDetail
data.value: Select the broken step and a compatible Library item, then Replace; or remove the step.

data.name: ShowBuilderDetail
data.value: Ordered cues, active Show and preparation entry

data.name: ShowsSubtitle
data.value: Build, prepare and run an ordered performance

data.name: NoNearbyMasksDetail
data.value: Start a scan and keep the mask awake and close by. You can continue creating content offline.

data.name: EmptyDeckDetail
data.value: Edit the Deck to add Library content.

data.name: NoShowCuesDetail
data.value: Edit the Show to add Scenes as ordered cues.

data.name: PhysicalOutputDetail
data.value: This is exact original-app preview artwork. LED appearance can vary on the physical mask.

data.name: PreparationNoPlay
data.value: Preparation uploads content but does not play it.

data.name: HoldToSendHint
data.value: Hold to send; tap for accessible confirmation

data.name: DeckHoldDescription
data.value: Require hold for this Deck's Live actions

data.name: EnterStageModeDetail
data.value: Stage locks normal navigation and keeps the display awake. Not Ready blocks entry; named degraded risks must be reviewed. Hold Exit for two seconds to leave.

data.name: KeepOneDeckDetail
data.value: MaskApp must keep at least one Live Deck.

data.name: DeleteDeckDetail
data.value: Only this Deck layout is removed. Source content and prepared mask slots remain available.

data.name: ResetLedgerDetail
data.value: This clears MaskApp's record for the active mask. It does not erase physical slots or source content.

data.name: HoldActionPlayingDetail
data.value: Choose Stop to restore the prior stable mask state.

data.name: ExitStageDetail
data.value: Stage navigation will unlock and display-awake mode will end.

data.name: NoReplayExitDetail
data.value: No mask action will be replayed. Exit Stage now?

data.name: HoldToExitDescription
data.value: Hold for two seconds and release to unlock and exit Stage

data.name: AccessibleExitDescription
data.value: Accessible two-step alternative to the two-second exit hold

data.name: OutputExplicitOnly
data.value: Output occurs only after an explicit cue press.

data.name: NoStageCuesDetail
data.value: Hold to exit, build a Deck or Show, run Preflight, then re-enter.

data.name: AccessibleHoldHint
data.value: Opens Start and Stop confirmations instead of requiring a sustained press

data.name: SessionPreservedNoReplay
data.value: Session preserved. Reconnect never replays output automatically.

data.name: StopDescription
data.value: Stop active and queued visual work while retaining the last stable look when available

data.name: BlackoutDescription
data.value: Emergency blackout. Cancel visual work and force mask brightness to protocol minimum

data.name: PreflightSubtitle
data.value: Prove the selected show is ready for this physical mask.

data.name: ReviewBlockedRevisionsDescription
data.value: Review the photosensitivity warning and explicitly acknowledge each exact blocked animation revision

data.name: RevokeFlashOverridesDescription
data.value: Revoke flash-risk acknowledgements and block those animation revisions again

data.name: MaskPackSubtitle
data.value: Move an offline show package through Files, AirDrop, or the share sheet.

data.name: ImportValidationDetail
data.value: The archive is bounded, hash-checked, and semantically validated before local content changes.

data.name: ConflictPreviewDetail
data.value: Choose a result for each existing ID. Merge keeps exact matches and safely renames different content.

data.name: ConfirmReplacementDetail
data.value: Replacement overwrites the selected local IDs. Built-in faces are never replaceable.

data.name: ExportMaskPackDetail
data.value: Export user faces, animations and timing, text presets, Decks, Scenes, Shows, and safe Library ordering.

data.name: PhotosensitivityWarningDetail
data.value: These exact animation revisions exceed the conservative limit of three full flashes per second. Rapid flashing may trigger seizures or other photosensitive reactions. Acknowledging does not make the content safe, and Blackout must remain immediately available. Record an explicit override for the revisions shown in this Preflight report?

data.name: RevokeFlashOverridesDetail
data.value: The affected animation revisions will be blocked again until they are edited to pass safety analysis or explicitly acknowledged again.

data.name: Ui017
data.value: Add Library items, then prepare text, DIY faces, and app animations for instant playback.

data.name: Ui022
data.value: Add, prepare, reorder, or remove shortcuts

data.name: Ui023
data.value: Affects stock text and animation SPEED modes.

data.name: Ui038
data.value: Auto-connect runs only while MaskApp is in the foreground.

data.name: Ui050
data.value: Build ordered cues here; edit detailed scene steps in Show Builder.

data.name: Ui063
data.value: Compose bounded typed cues, rehearse them, and order them into Stage setlists.

data.name: Ui071
data.value: Connection, live controls, and evidence from the active mask.

data.name: Ui092
data.value: Drag thumbnails or use accessible move buttons.

data.name: Ui098
data.value: Editable 46 by 58 animation frame with non-destructive mask and eye guides

data.name: Ui100
data.value: Emergency blackout. Cancel visual work and force mask brightness to protocol minimum

data.name: Ui103
data.value: Experimental · foreground only · physical-mask evidence required

data.name: Ui107
data.value: Export user faces, animations and timing, text presets, Pages, Scenes, setlists, and safe Library ordering.

data.name: Ui113
data.value: Favorites kept within one tap for live use

data.name: Ui119
data.value: Fix blocking items before entering Stage; warnings keep the show degraded.

data.name: Ui125
data.value: GIF/video input is bounded before decode and remains a draft until saved.

data.name: Ui128
data.value: Hold for two seconds and release to unlock and exit Stage

data.name: Ui135
data.value: Choose a result for each existing ID. Merge keeps exact matches and safely renames different content.

data.name: Ui141
data.value: Choose what you want to create or browse.

data.name: Ui161
data.value: Long-press and drag, or use the accessible Move earlier/later controls.

data.name: Ui163
data.value: Looping, tempo, slot budget, and the exact-revision flash gate.

data.name: Ui169
data.value: MaskApp does not infer visible support from packet construction or a successful write-without-response. Live microphone input stays locked until this exact mask passes the finite test and you confirm the physical result.

data.name: Ui176
data.value: Move an offline show package through Files, AirDrop, or the share sheet.

data.name: Ui187
data.value: No available Gallery items for this page.

data.name: Ui195
data.value: Observed values only; unavailable telemetry stays explicitly unavailable.

data.name: Ui196
data.value: One-tap controls for live use. Prepare uploads before the show.

data.name: Ui198
data.value: Only bounded built-in step types are available; arbitrary scripts are not supported.

data.name: Ui199
data.value: Only the page layout is removed. Library items and mask slots stay available.

data.name: Ui205
data.value: Open Manage and add the items you want on stage.

data.name: Ui208
data.value: Opens a locked performance surface with Stop and Blackout always available

data.name: Ui209
data.value: Opens experimental foreground microphone effects behind a per-mask physical test gate

data.name: Ui210
data.value: Original-app artwork; physical mask output may vary.

data.name: Ui211
data.value: Output occurs only after an explicit cue press.

data.name: Ui221
data.value: Photosensitivity warning: an explicit override does not make unsafe content safe.

data.name: Ui232
data.value: Prepare uploads unique frames once; Preview uses the production scheduler and safety gate.

data.name: Ui233
data.value: Prepared DIY slots are isolated to the active mask profile. Run Preflight after switching masks.

data.name: Ui240
data.value: Prove the selected show is ready for this physical mask.

data.name: Ui260
data.value: Rename, recolor, or reorder this page.

data.name: Ui262
data.value: Replacement overwrites the selected local IDs. Built-in faces are never replaceable.

data.name: Ui263
data.value: Reset prepared-slot ledger for this mask

data.name: Ui267
data.value: Review the photosensitivity warning and explicitly acknowledge each exact blocked animation revision

data.name: Ui268
data.value: Revoke flash-risk acknowledgements and block those animation revisions again

data.name: Ui288
data.value: Scan, choose the physical mask, and connect.

data.name: Ui297
data.value: Search name, ID, hex, or tag

data.name: Ui300
data.value: Select and move connected face pixels

data.name: Ui305
data.value: Sends a short deterministic sequence, then stops

data.name: Ui306
data.value: Sends this stock item to the connected mask

data.name: Ui308
data.value: Session preserved. Reconnect never replays output automatically.

data.name: Ui321
data.value: Starting asks for microphone permission. Leaving this page, locking/backgrounding the app, an audio interruption, route change, disconnect, Stop, or Blackout ends capture; returning never restarts it.

data.name: Ui327
data.value: Stop active and queued visual work while retaining the last stable look when available

data.name: Ui329
data.value: Stops microphone capture and cancels queued visual work

data.name: Ui330
data.value: Stops microphone capture and sends the emergency dark command

data.name: Ui339
data.value: The archive is bounded, hash-checked, and semantically validated before local content changes.

data.name: Ui340
data.value: The Stage follows this exact order when the set is active.

data.name: Ui341
data.value: These are the original app previews. Physical mask output can vary by hardware and firmware.

data.name: Ui349
data.value: Try a different name or ID.

data.name: Ui357
data.value: Uses microphone samples locally and sends nothing to the mask

data.name: Ui372
data.value: This will keep live microphone input disabled for the current mask until another finite test passes.

data.name: Ui375
data.value: These exact animation revisions exceed the conservative limit of three full flashes per second. Rapid flashing may trigger seizures or other photosensitive reactions. Acknowledging does not make the content safe, and Blackout must remain immediately available. Record an explicit override for the revisions shown in this Preflight report?

data.name: Ui378
data.value: The affected animation revisions will be blocked again until they are edited to pass safety analysis or explicitly acknowledged again.

data.name: Ui382
data.value: Preflight still has warnings. Blackout remains available, but the warnings should be reviewed before live use.

data.name: Ui385
data.value: These exact animation revisions exceed the conservative limit of three full flashes per second. Acknowledging does not make them safe. Keep Blackout immediately available?

data.name: Ui386
data.value: The affected revisions will be blocked again until edited or explicitly acknowledged.

data.name: Ui392
data.value: This clears only MaskApp's prepared-content record for the active mask. It does not erase physical mask slots, other masks, presets, scenes, or animations.

data.name: Ui397
data.value: This device does not report camera capture support.

data.name: Ui401
data.value: Image decoding is not available on this platform build.

data.name: Ui437
data.value: Start a scan and keep the mask awake and close by.

data.name: Ui438
data.value: Hold to exit, build Pages or a setlist, run Preflight, then re-enter.

data.name: Ui439
data.value: The checked scope has no known blockers or warnings.

data.name: Ui441
data.value: Connect a mask and run the finite test before using microphone input.

data.name: Ui458
data.value: Drop Detector is limited to two pulses per second and the live flash gate cannot be overridden.

data.name: Ui459
data.value: All modes use a non-overridable live gate that suppresses a fourth full-bright rise inside one second.

data.name: Ui460
data.value: Connect to a mask before running the finite audio visualization test.

data.name: Ui461
data.value: Run the finite deterministic test on a physical mask before recording a result.

data.name: Ui462
data.value: The finite test ran, but no active mask profile exists; its result was not saved.

data.name: Ui463
data.value: Audio Labs failed. Stop the effect and check Device diagnostics.

data.name: Ui464
data.value: Record Passed only if the full deterministic sequence was visible, stable, and returned to dark on the currently connected physical mask. A BLE write alone is not proof.

data.name: Ui465
data.value: No physical audio visualization evidence has been recorded for this mask.

data.name: Ui466
data.value: The finite test was sent. Confirm the visible result on the physical mask.

data.name: Ui467
data.value: Audio visualization was physically confirmed for this mask.

data.name: Ui468
data.value: Audio visualization failed physical confirmation for this mask.

data.name: Ui469
data.value: The required audio visualization characteristic is unavailable on this mask.

data.name: Ui473
data.value: Microphone visualizer is running in the foreground.

data.name: Ui475
data.value: Audio Labs is blocked. Check the connection, microphone permission, and physical-test gate.

data.name: Ui480
data.value: The audio visualization operation could not be completed. Check the connection and microphone permission.

data.name: Ui484
data.value: Audio visualization is not supported by this mask.

data.name: AutoSlotHint
data.value: Choose the next safe unreserved DIY slot
